original: While galotians may be infamously as libidinous as they are dull-witted, a specially cut, specially treated picardine gem can remedy the latter. The process is not entirely well-understood, but by taking a gemstone inside themselves, galotians can find themselves with greatly increased cognition. (This item has no effect for non-goo creatures.) (Provides +20 intelligence and +20 willpower to gooey beings.)
